channel.title: firecracker on Magistr and Maps
channel.description: Recent content in firecracker on Magistr and Maps

item.title: swamp-go-brr, the brain
item.description: Last post I built a cage — a Firecracker microVM to hold an agent I had let off the leash. This post is about what I put in it, and why the thing I put in it is a state machine and not a swarm.

item.title: Build the cage first
item.description: Two of Simon Wardley’s predictions have sat on my map for years: that serverless was the next evolution of devops, and that conversational programming was the one after it.
